summary: Iteration 41 — Placement Intelligence & Matching Engine fully verified. 18/18 backend tests PASS (12 existing + 6 new edge-case tests added). Frontend UI verified end-to-end for manager flow (list → detail → factor modal → decision modal → editor) and RBAC for staff (graceful 403 handling, no crash). Adult Services Hub sector boundary preserved.

minor.issue: PATCH binds to the full ReferralIn model and requires yp_initials even on partial updates. Not strictly broken (frontend sends full body) but semantically PATCH should accept partial. Consider a separate ReferralPatchIn with optional fields or switching to PUT.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Refactor PATCH /api/referrals/{rid} to accept partial updates via a separate ReferralPatchIn model. Current impl forces yp_initials in body. Frontend currently works because it re-sends the full ref object — so no user-facing impact.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 9046 lines — well over the 700-line guideline. Should be split into routers per feature (referrals, placement_intelligence, etc.). Iteration 41 endpoints (~165 lines) could live in a dedicated router module.
PATCH endpoint semantically should accept partial body; using POST model on PATCH is a minor REST violation.
Good: all referral endpoints correctly exclude `_id` from Mongo via projection `{"_id": 0}`.
Good: deterministic engine verified — same input yields same score/confidence/factor list across calls.
Good: explainability arithmetic verified — sum(group_warning.weight) == analysis.score holds.
Good: audit_trail is appended on every decision and edit; suitable for Ofsted/RI evidence.
Good: unknown needs/conditions are filtered out server-side (defense in depth).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration41_extra.py (new — 6 additional tests for listing, partial 404, PATCH lock-after-accept, factor_chain, decision condition filtering, decision RBAC)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all required data-testids found and verified; modals open; sector boundary preserved; RBAC graceful)

test_credentials: All four roles verified working: admin@care.local / Admin@123, manager@care.local / Manager@123, senior@care.local / Senior@123, staff@care.local / Staff@123
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST-prefixed referrals (ZZTEST, PATCH1, CHAIN, DECF, LOWT, TMP1, JUNK) and clean them up via admin DELETE in finally blocks.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 (Placement Intelligence) is fully green. Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration41.py (original 12) and test_iteration41_extra.py (additional 6). Must export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL before running pytest (frontend/.env value). Frontend UI verified at /children?tab=referrals — all data-testids match spec exactly: referrals-matching-root, home-readiness-panel, home-readiness-tile-{emotional_climate|behaviour_pressure|missing_trend|safeguarding_pressure|staffing_readiness}, referral-new-btn, referrals-list, referral-row-{id}, referral-editor, ref-initials, referral-save-btn, referral-detail, matching-confidence-banner, referral-home-readiness, group-dynamics-section, group-warning-{domain}, what-needs-to-change, referral-decide-btn, referral-pdf-btn, factor-modal, decision-modal, decision-save. Staff users get 403 from API and see 'Could not load referrals' toast + empty state (no crash). Adult Hub does not include the referrals tab.
frontend_verified_flows: Welcome → Enter workspace (Children's) → login (manager) → /children?tab=referrals renders home-readiness panel with 5 tiles + active referrals list

Click referral-row → detail view shows matching-confidence-banner (Manageable, score 28), referral-home-readiness, group-dynamics-section with 3 weighted warnings (exploitation 8, missing-influence 10, behaviour-trigger 10), what-needs-to-change
Click group-warning-* → factor-modal opens showing evidence (NEEDS: cse) and linked residents (Mads, Aisha)
Click referral-decide-btn → decision-modal opens with decision dropdown, reason textarea, 13 condition chips, Save decision button
Click referral-new-btn → referral-editor renders with ref-initials input and referral-save-btn
Sector boundary: /adults does NOT contain 'Referrals & Matching' text or referrals-matching-root testid
Staff RBAC: tab is visible but API returns 403; UI shows 'Could not load referrals' error toast and empty referrals state, no crash
rca_of_the_issue: No critical issues found. Single minor observation: PATCH /api/referrals/{rid} requires the full ReferralIn body (yp_initials required field) — this is a semantic REST violation but does not affect users because the frontend re-sends the full referral object on edit.
